desc:
Savage Divide Treasure Map #7 dig site: This treasure can be found in the mountains south of Savage Divide, east of the Spruce Knob Campground. The pile of earth is on a rocky outcrop, from which one sees the two metal things as seen on the treasure map.
Grid G3 (X: 2485, Y: 1168.3)
Submitted By MrCrazy
